speaker: speaker2
text: Hi . It ’ s Tony calling from the dentist ’ s office . Is Lily there ?

speaker: speaker1
text: No , Lily is not here at the moment .

speaker: speaker2
text: Could you ask her to call me back when she gets in ?

speaker: speaker1
text: Sure . What ’ s your number , please .

speaker: speaker1
text: Thanks . And your name is Tony , right ?

speaker: speaker2
text: Yes . I ’ m Tony . Thank you very much .
